_doc: Declarative registry of PUBLIC identity/demand surfaces the link-health organ checks for dead links. A dead link on an identity surface repels the exact visitors the front door is built to pull, so this is demand-hygiene, not cosmetics. The organ (scripts/link-health.py) reads this every cadence, fetches each surface, extracts its outbound links, and probes each one; a 404 on any tracked surface fails the predicate. Add a surface = add one entry here, never a code change. Override the path with LIMEN_LINK_SURFACES. This file PUBLISHES (it names public URLs only) — never put a private URL or token here.

remap.why: the working GitHub Pages org is `organvm`; the bare `4444j99.github.io` user site has no Pages build and 404s on every path. Swap the host, keep the path — the target then resolves 200.

surfaces.label: GitHub profile README — the identity front door
surfaces.why: top identity surface; every visitor the discoverability pass pulls lands here first
